creator: hiroo.ono+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 253378
new port: wlr-dpms

This is a port of wlr-dpms. A program to turn the display on and off for wlroots based Wayland compositors that support wlr-output-power-management-unstable-v1.
There is a similar program wlr-randr, but it needs wlr-output-management-unstable-v1 which deals with more broad functions.
